prose:
The frontier-orbitals calculation on oxygen using DFT at the B3LYP functional with the def2-TZVP basis set (tier 'standard') in the gas phase with a multiplicity of 3 has been completed. The method used is "b3lyp/def2-tzvp" in PySCF.

The HOMO energy is approximately -8.87 eV, the LUMO energy is approximately -3.59 eV, and the HOMO–LUMO gap is approximately 5.29 eV. The SCF converged successfully in 7 cycles, and all integrity checks passed with no errors.
